evals.prompt: Tests are all green on feature/auth-jwt in a worktree. Help me finish the branch.
evals.expected_behavior: Announces the skill, verifies tests and clean worktree, presents the four options clearly, and executes the chosen integration path (or waits for user choice) with proper validation and cleanup where applicable.
assertions: Announces use of the finishing-a-development-branch skill
Confirms tests are passing before presenting options 1-3
Lists the four options (merge locally, push+PR, keep, discard)
Respects the test gate (does not offer merge/PR/keep on red)

evals.prompt: The branch has failing tests and the approach didn't work. Discard it.
evals.expected_behavior: Allows Option 4 (Discard) even when tests are failing, requires explicit 'discard' confirmation, force-deletes the branch and cleans the worktree, and reports completion.
assertions: Recognizes that Options 1-3 are blocked by failing tests
Still offers and executes Discard (Option 4) with confirmation
Performs branch deletion and worktree cleanup
